creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #1)

>    Remove WWW from pkg-descr as the site is no longer online

For orientation (considering newcomers to the port, and so on): better than nothing, maybe refer to a Wayback Machine capture of the site. 

Re <https://github.com/cooljeanius/stress-1.0.4/issues/2#issuecomment-907523130> for what it's worth, I'd take the July 2019 capture of the more recent of the two sites: 

<https://web.archive.org/web/20190707055144/http://people.seas.harvard.edu:80/~apw/stress/>

Thanks
